messages.text: Hey Alex — saw your post on event-driven architecture at Stripe. We back early-stage AI startups at Embedding VC and are always looking to connect strong distributed-systems engineers with great teams. Would you be open to exploring?
Thanks! Happy to connect. What kind of role are you hiring for?
